Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow
OAuth 2.0 client-side flow helpers.

Thin facades over Nimbus SDK grant types and TokenRequest. Each helper exposes a Juneau-style builder and returns a Juneau-native OAuthToken record.

Flow inventory
  • OAuthClientCredentialsFlow
  • OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow (with PKCE)
  • OAuthRefreshTokenFlow
  • OAuthResourceOwnerFlow (discouraged)
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
    OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.oidc
    OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0 client.
  • Class
    Description
    OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow
    Authorization-code grant (RFC 6749 §4.1) flow helper with mandatory PKCE per RFC 7636.
    OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow.Builder
    Builder.
    OAuthClientCredentialsFlow
    Client-credentials grant (RFC 6749 §4.4) flow helper.
    OAuthClientCredentialsFlow.Builder
    Builder.
    OAuthFlowException
    Runtime exception thrown by any OAuth flow helper when the IdP rejects the request, the HTTP round-trip fails, or the response can't be parsed.
    OAuthRefreshTokenFlow
    Refresh-token grant (RFC 6749 §6) flow helper.
    OAuthRefreshTokenFlow.Builder
    Builder.
    OAuthResourceOwnerFlow
    Deprecated.
    Use OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow (with PKCE) wherever possible.
    OAuthResourceOwnerFlow.Builder
    Deprecated.
